limits: world_size fixed to 8 for the first seed contract because the A2 baseline requires epWorldSize % 8 == 0
EP-only path only; TP group remains empty
hidden size fixed to 7168 for the A2/910B baseline contract
local expert count fixed to 1 per rank
PTO seed uses a host-precomputed destination-major flattened gather map plus host HCCL all_to_all_single
seed_variant.name: ep_only_top1_fp16_dispatch

tiling.strategy: destination-major local send packing with contiguous per-core token-row ownership via a flattened gather map stopgap
